[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100100010 3
1 101111000 5
2 001001100 3
3 001011111 6
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 101110011 6
7 001001101 4

01 10 101111111 8
12 21 001111101 6
23 32 101111001 6
34 43 101110011 6 match 6
45 54 101111010 6
56 65 101111100 6
67 76 001011111 6 match 3
70 07 101111111 8

13 31 101111101 7
24 42 100111011 6
35 53 101111001 6

71 17 001011111 6 match 3

61 16 001001101 4 match 7
